privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real digital forensic test image (DFTT #7 NTFS Undelete test image) downloaded from SourceForge and placed at /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd. The task instructions accurately reflect the expected case name (EDiscovery_Smith_v_Corp), case number (CIV-2024-882), and directory paths for raw (/home/ga/Reports/Production/raw) and bates (/home/ga/Reports/Production/bates) production outputs, which are strictly verified by the export scripts and verifier.
